revision.text:
'''國魂神社'''（くにたまじんじゃ）は、[[福島県]][[いわき市]][[勿来町]]にある神社である。
==祭神== *[[大国主神]] *[[須勢理姫命]] *[[少彦名命]]
==歴史== この神社は、[[806年]]（[[大同]]元年）に創建されたと伝えられ、その後は、この地の領主などの尊崇を受けた。
==文化財== *いわき市指定有形文化財 **[[梵鐘]]
==所在地== *福島県いわき市勿来町窪田馬場72
==外部リンク== *[http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html 國魂神社サイト] *[http://www.db.fks.ed.jp/txt/10090.002/index.html いわき市の文化財]
[[category:福島県の神社|くにたましんしや]] [[category:いわき市|くにたましんしや]] {{shinto-stub}}

'''國魂神社'''（くにたまじんじゃ）は、[[福島県]][[いわき市]]勿来町にある神社である。
==祭神== *[[大国主神]] *[[須勢理姫命]] *[[少彦名命]]
==歴史== この神社は、[[806年]]（[[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年）に創建されたと伝えられ、その後は、この地の領主などの尊崇を受けた。国魂神は 出雲国意宇郡善飯梨郷（現；島根県安来市）に降臨したとつたえられる。
==文化財== *いわき市指定有形文化財 **[[梵鐘]]
==所在地== *福島県いわき市勿来町窪田馬場72
==外部リンク== *[http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html 國魂神社サイト] *[http://www.db.fks.ed.jp/txt/10090.002/index.html いわき市の文化財]
{{DEFAULTSORT:くにたましんしや}} [[category:福島県の神社]] [[category:いわき市]] {{shinto-stub}}

==歴史== この神社は、[[806年]]（[[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年）に創建されたと伝えられ、その後は、この地の領主などの尊崇を受けた。{{要出典範囲|国魂神は出雲国意宇郡善飯梨郷（現；島根県安来市）に降臨したとつたえられる。|date=2010年11月}}
==文化財== *いわき市指定有形文化財 **[[梵鐘]]
==所在地== *福島県いわき市勿来町窪田馬場72

{{ill|Suserihime-no-Mikoto|ja|須勢理姫命}}

in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku {{Shrine | name = Kunitama Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Haiden.jpg|270px|]]
Haiden (Worship Hall) | location = {{ill|Iwaki City, Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Kubota Baba 72 | Latitude = 36 | Latitude minutes = 53 | Latitude seconds = 37.2 | Longitude = 140 | Longitude minutes = 45 | Longitude seconds = 51.4 | Label position = left | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}
{{ill|Suserihime-no-Mikoto|ja|須勢理姫命}}
{{ill|Sukuna-hikona|ja|少彦名命}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} | consecration_year = {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同}} 元年 (806 CE) | Main Festival = The day before {{ill|Health and Sports Day|ja|体育の日}} in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|道奥菊多国造}} * {{ill|Nakoso|ja|勿来}} == External Links == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html Official Kunitama Shrine Website] * [http://www.db.fks.ed.jp/txt/10090.002/index.html Iwaki City Cultural Properties Database] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Kunikami been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Suserihime-no-Mikoto|ja|須勢理姫命}}
{{ill|Sukuna-hikona|ja|少彦名命}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} | consecration_year = {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同}} 元年 (806 CE) | Main Festival = The day before {{ill|Health and Sports Day|ja|体育の日}} in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kunitama Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Haiden.jpg|270px|]]
Haiden (Worship Hall) | location = {{ill|Iwaki City, Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Kubota Baba 72 | Latitude = 36 | Latitude minutes = 53 | Latitude seconds = 37.2 | Longitude = 140 | Longitude minutes = 45 | Longitude seconds = 51.4 | Label position = left | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}
{{ill|Suserihime-no-Mikoto|ja|須勢理姫命}}
{{ill|Sukuna-hikona|ja|少彦名命}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} | consecration_year = {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同}} 元年 (806 CE) | Main Festival = The day before {{ill|Health and Sports Day|ja|体育の日}} in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|道奥菊多国造}} * {{ill|Nakoso|ja|勿来}} == External Links == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html Official Kunitama Shrine Website] * [http://www.db.fks.ed.jp/txt/10090.002/index.html Iwaki City Cultural Properties Database] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] Haiden (Worship Hall) | location = {{ill|Iwaki City, Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Kubota Baba 72 | Latitude = 36 | Latitude minutes = 53 | Latitude seconds = 37.2 | Longitude = 140 | Longitude minutes = 45 | Longitude seconds = 51.4 | Label position = left | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}
{{ill|Suserihime-no-Mikoto|ja|須勢理姫命}}
{{ill|Sukuna-hikona|ja|少彦名命}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} | consecration_year = {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同}} 元年 (806 CE) | Main Festival = The day before {{ill|Health and Sports Day|ja|体育の日}} in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|道奥菊多国造}} * {{ill|Nakoso|ja|勿来}} == External Links == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html Official Kunitama Shrine Website] * [http://www.db.fks.ed.jp/txt/10090.002/index.html Iwaki City Cultural Properties Database] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kunitama Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Haiden.jpg|270px|]]
Haiden (Worship Hall) | location = {{ill|Iwaki City, Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Kubota Baba 72 | Latitude = 36 | Latitude minutes = 53 | Latitude seconds = 37.2 | Longitude = 140 | Longitude minutes = 45 | Longitude seconds = 51.4 | Label position = left | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}
{{ill|Suserihime-no-Mikoto|ja|須勢理姫命}}
{{ill|Sukuna-hikona|ja|少彦名命}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} | consecration_year = {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同}} 元年 (806 CE) | Main Festival = The day before {{ill|Health and Sports Day|ja|体育の日}} in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|道奥菊多国造}} * {{ill|Nakoso|ja|勿来}} == External Links == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html Official Kunitama Shrine Website] * [http://www.db.fks.ed.jp/txt/10090.002/index.html Iwaki City Cultural Properties Database] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|道奥菊多国造}} * {{ill|Nakoso|ja|勿来}} == External Links == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html Official Kunitama Shrine Website] * {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kunitama Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Haiden.jpg|270px|]]
Haiden (Worship Hall) | location = {{ill|Iwaki City, Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Kubota Baba 72 | Latitude = 36 | Latitude minutes = 53 | Latitude seconds = 37.2 | Longitude = 140 | Longitude minutes = 45 | Longitude seconds = 51.4 | Label position = left | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}
{{ill|Suserihime-no-Mikoto|ja|須勢理姫命}}
{{ill|Sukuna-hikona|ja|少彦名命}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} | consecration_year = {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同}} 元年 (806 CE) | Main Festival = The day before {{ill|Health and Sports Day|ja|体育の日}} in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|道奥菊多国造}} * {{ill|Nakoso|ja|勿来}} == External Links == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html Official Kunitama Shrine Website] * in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kunitama Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Haiden.jpg|270px|]]
Haiden (Worship Hall) | location = {{ill|Iwaki City, Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Kubota Baba 72 | Latitude = 36 | Latitude minutes = 53 | Latitude seconds = 37.2 | Longitude = 140 | Longitude minutes = 45 | Longitude seconds = 51.4 | Label position = left | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}
{{ill|Suserihime-no-Mikoto|ja|須勢理姫命}}
{{ill|Sukuna-hikona|ja|少彦名命}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} | consecration_year = {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同}} 元年 (806 CE) | Main Festival = The day before {{ill|Health and Sports Day|ja|体育の日}} in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|道奥菊多国造}} * {{ill|Nakoso|ja|勿来}} == External Links == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html Official Kunitama Shrine Website] * {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kunitama Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Haiden.jpg|270px|]]
Haiden (Worship Hall) | location = {{ill|Iwaki City, Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Kubota Baba 72 | Latitude = 36 | Latitude minutes = 53 | Latitude seconds = 37.2 | Longitude = 140 | Longitude minutes = 45 | Longitude seconds = 51.4 | Label position = left | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}
{{ill|Suserihime-no-Mikoto|ja|須勢理姫命}}
{{ill|Sukuna-hikona|ja|少彦名命}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} | consecration_year = {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同}} 元年 (806 CE) | Main Festival = The day before {{ill|Health and Sports Day|ja|体育の日}} in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|道奥菊多国造}} * {{ill|Nakoso|ja|勿来}} == External Links == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html Official Kunitama Shrine Website] * {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kunitama Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Haiden.jpg|270px|]]
Haiden (Worship Hall) | location = {{ill|Iwaki City, Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Kubota Baba 72 | Latitude = 36 | Latitude minutes = 53 | Latitude seconds = 37.2 | Longitude = 140 | Longitude minutes = 45 | Longitude seconds = 51.4 | Label position = left | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}
{{ill|Suserihime-no-Mikoto|ja|須勢理姫命}}
{{ill|Sukuna-hikona|ja|少彦名命}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} | consecration_year = {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同}} 元年 (806 CE) | Main Festival = The day before {{ill|Health and Sports Day|ja|体育の日}} in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|道奥菊多国造}} * {{ill|Nakoso|ja|勿来}} == External Links == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html Official Kunitama Shrine Website] * {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kunitama Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Haiden.jpg|270px|]]
Haiden (Worship Hall) | location = {{ill|Iwaki City, Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Kubota Baba 72 | Latitude = 36 | Latitude minutes = 53 | Latitude seconds = 37.2 | Longitude = 140 | Longitude minutes = 45 | Longitude seconds = 51.4 | Label position = left | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}
{{ill|Suserihime-no-Mikoto|ja|須勢理姫命}}
{{ill|Sukuna-hikona|ja|少彦名命}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} | consecration_year = {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同}} 元年 (806 CE) | Main Festival = The day before {{ill|Health and Sports Day|ja|体育の日}} in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|道奥菊多国造}} * {{ill|Nakoso|ja|勿来}} == External Links == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html Official Kunitama Shrine Website] * {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kunitama Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Haiden.jpg|270px|]]
Haiden (Worship Hall) | location = {{ill|Iwaki City, Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Kubota Baba 72 | Latitude = 36 | Latitude minutes = 53 | Latitude seconds = 37.2 | Longitude = 140 | Longitude minutes = 45 | Longitude seconds = 51.4 | Label position = left | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}
{{ill|Suserihime-no-Mikoto|ja|須勢理姫命}}
{{ill|Sukuna-hikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} | consecration_year = {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同}} 元年 (806 CE) | Main Festival = The day before {{ill|Health and Sports Day|ja|体育の日}} in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|道奥菊多国造}} * {{ill|Nakoso|ja|勿来}} == External Links == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html Official Kunitama Shrine Website] * [http://www.db.fks.ed.jp/txt/10090.002/index.html Iwaki City Cultural Properties Database] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 2]] {{ill|Sukuna-hikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} | consecration_year = {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同}} 元年 (806 CE) | Main Festival = The day before {{ill|Health and Sports Day|ja|体育の日}} in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Kunitama Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Haiden.jpg|270px|]]
Haiden (Worship Hall) | location = {{ill|Iwaki City, Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Kubota Baba 72 | Latitude = 36 | Latitude minutes = 53 | Latitude seconds = 37.2 | Longitude = 140 | Longitude minutes = 45 | Longitude seconds = 51.4 | Label position = left | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}
{{ill|Suserihime-no-Mikoto|ja|須勢理姫命}}
{{ill|Sukuna-hikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} | consecration_year = {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同}} 元年 (806 CE) | Main Festival = The day before {{ill|Health and Sports Day|ja|体育の日}} in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|道奥菊多国造}} * {{ill|Nakoso|ja|勿来}} == External Links == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html Official Kunitama Shrine Website] * [http://www.db.fks.ed.jp/txt/10090.002/index.html Iwaki City Cultural Properties Database] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 2]] {{ill|Iwaki City|ja|いわき市}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ''' {{ill|Bonshō|ja|梵鐘}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Jōban Expressway|ja|常磐自動車道}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|ja|勿来駅}} on the {{ill|Jōban Line|ja|常磐線}}, operated by {{ill|JR East|ja|東日本旅客鉄道}}. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|lt=Suseri-Hime|lt=Suserihime-no-Mikoto|ja|須勢理姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suserihime-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スセリビメ}}
{{ill|Sukuna-hikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukuna-hikona|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スクナビコナ}} | Main Hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] | consecration_year = [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō Era]] 元年 (806 CE) | Main Festival = The day before {{ill|Health and Sports Day|ja|体育の日|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Health and Sports Day|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スポーツの日 (日本)}} in October | Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in [[:en:Iwaki, Fukushima|Iwaki City]], Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suseri-Hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スセリビメ}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スクナビコナ}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daidō Era|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ** [[:en:Bonshō|Bonshō]] (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|qq=}} on the [[:en:Jōban Expressway|Jōban Expressway]]. * 10 minutes by taxi from [[:en:Nakoso Station|Nakoso Station]] on the [[:en:Jōban Line|Jōban Line]], operated by [[:en:East Japan Railway Company|JR East]]. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|道奥菊多国造|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|qq=}} * {{ill|Nakoso|ja|勿来|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakoso|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 勿来地区}} == External Links == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html Official Kunitama Shrine Website] * [http://www.db.fks.ed.jp/txt/10090.002/index.html Iwaki City Cultural Properties Database] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|國魂神社|version=16465017|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] }} [[sn:Kunikami Shrine]] [[ja:國魂神社]] [[Category:Pages with no Wikidata]]

{{神社 |名称 = 國魂神社 |画像 = [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Haiden.jpg|270px|]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[福島県]][[いわき市]][[勿来町窪田]]馬場72 | 緯度度 = 36 |緯度分 = 53 |緯度秒 = 37.2 | 経度度 = 140 |経度分 = 45 |経度秒 = 51.4 |ラベル位置 = left |祭神 = [[大国主神]]
[[須勢理姫命]]
[[少彦名命]] |神体 = |社格 = |創建 = [[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年（[[806年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月[[体育の日]]前日 |神事 = |地図 = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|鳥居}}]] '''國魂神社'''（くにたまじんじゃ）は、[[福島県]][[いわき市]][[勿来町窪田]]にある神社である。 == 祭神 == *[[大国主神]] *[[須勢理姫命]] *[[少彦名命]] == 歴史 == [[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年（[[806年]]）創建と伝えられ、その後は、この地の領主などの尊崇を受けた。 == 境内 == * いわき市指定有形文化財 ** [[梵鐘]] File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|本殿 File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|梵鐘 File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|御霊神社 File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|北野神社 == 交通アクセス == * [[常磐自動車道]]「[[いわき勿来インターチェンジ|いわき勿来I.C]]」より車で5分。 * [[東日本旅客鉄道]]（JR東日本）[[常磐線]]「[[勿来駅]]」よりタクシーで10分。 == 関連項目 == * [[道奥菊多国造]] * [[勿来]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html 國魂神社サイト] * [http://www.db.fks.ed.jp/txt/10090.002/index.html いわき市の文化財] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:くにたましんしや}} [[Category:福島県の神社]] [[Category:いわき市の歴史]] [[Category:いわき市の建築物]]

{{神社 |名称 = 國魂神社 |画像 = [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Haiden.jpg|270px|]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[福島県]][[いわき市]][[勿来町窪田]]馬場72 | 緯度度 = 36 |緯度分 = 53 |緯度秒 = 37.2 | 経度度 = 140 |経度分 = 45 |経度秒 = 51.4 |ラベル位置 = left |祭神 = [[大国主神]]
[[須勢理姫命]]
[[少彦名命]] |神体 = |社格 = |創建 = [[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年（[[806年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月[[体育の日]]前日 |神事 = |地図 = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|鳥居}}]] '''國魂神社'''（くにたまじんじゃ）は、[[福島県]][[いわき市]][[勿来町窪田]]にある神社である。 == 祭神 == *[[大国主神]] *[[須勢理姫命]] *[[少彦名命]] == 歴史 == [[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年（[[806年]]）創建と伝えられ、その後は、この地の領主などの尊崇を受けた。 == 境内 == * いわき市指定有形文化財 ** [[梵鐘]] File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|本殿 File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|梵鐘 File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|御霊神社 File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|北野神社 == 交通アクセス == * [[常磐自動車道]]「[[いわき勿来インターチェンジ|いわき勿来I.C]]」より車で5分。 * [[東日本旅客鉄道]]（JR東日本）[[常磐線]]「[[勿来駅]]」よりタクシーで10分。 == 関連項目 == * [[道奥菊多国造]] * [[勿来]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html 國魂神社サイト] * [http://www.db.fks.ed.jp/txt/10090.002/index.html いわき市の文化財] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:くにたましんしや}} [[Category:福島県の神社]] [[Category:いわき市の歴史]] [[Category:いわき市の建築物]]

Map = Japan Fukushima }} [[File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in [[:en:Iwaki, Fukushima|Iwaki City]], Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suseri-Hime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スセリビメ}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スクナビコナ}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daidō Era|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ** [[:en:Bonshō|Bonshō]] (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car from the {{ill|Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|ja|いわき勿来インターチェンジ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaki-Nakoso Interchange|qq=|1=Iwaki-nakoso interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11260130}} on the [[:en:Jōban Expressway|Jōban Expressway]]. * 10 minutes by taxi from [[:en:Nakoso Station|Nakoso Station]] on the [[:en:Jōban Line|Jōban Line]], operated by [[:en:East Japan Railway Company|JR East]]. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|道奥菊多国造|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Michinoku Kikuta Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|qq=}} * {{ill|Nakoso|ja|勿来|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakoso|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 勿来地区|1=Nakoso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10901520}} == External Links == * [http://www.kunitamajinja.com/index.html Official Kunitama Shrine Website] * [http://www.db.fks.ed.jp/txt/10090.002/index.html Iwaki City Cultural Properties Database] {{Shinto Horizontal}} '''Kunitama Shrine''' (國魂神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Iwaki, Fukushima|en|Iwaki, Fukushima|qid=Q274384|lt=Iwaki City|1=Iwaki, Fukushima}}, Nakoso Town, Fukushima Prefecture, Japan. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} * {{ill|Suseri-Hime|ja|須勢理姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suseri-Hime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スセリビメ}} * {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スクナビコナ}} == History == The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|Daidō Era|ja|大同元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daidō Era|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (806 CE) and has since been revered by local rulers and residents. == Grounds == * Designated Tangible Cultural Property of Iwaki City: ** {{ill|Bonshō|en|Bonshō|qid=Q8192099|lt=Bonshō|1=Bonshō}} (Temple bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Honden.jpg|Honden (Main Hall) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Shorou.jpg|Bonshō (Temple Bell) File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha1.jpg|Goryō Shrine File:Kunitama Jinja Iwaki Keidaisha2.jpg|Kitano Shrine == Transportation Access == * 5 minutes by car {{ill|Jōban Expressway|en|Jōban Expressway|qid=Q1059875|lt=Jōban Expressway|1=Jōban Expressway}}. * 10 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Nakoso Station|en|Nakoso Station|qid=Q5353514|lt=Nakoso
